title: Baseline scope excludes ESG by default
arguments: Run a security compliance assessment for a B2B SaaS. We are not requesting sustainability or carbon reporting frameworks. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry saas --strict-facts

title: FedRAMP should stay conditional
arguments: Non-government B2B SaaS with no federal contracts asks for standard compliance roadmap. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry saas --strict-facts

title: Low-regulation profile should avoid over-scoping
arguments: Internal productivity web app for one private company, no healthcare data, no cardholder data, no EU users. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry internal-tools --strict-facts

title: US SaaS should avoid AI and finance over-scoping
arguments: US B2B SaaS with no EU users, no financial customers, and no government contracts requests a practical baseline roadmap. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry saas --strict-facts

title: EU SaaS without healthcare or payments
arguments: EU-only SaaS with no healthcare data and no cardholder processing requests security compliance guidance with tight scope control. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry saas --strict-facts
